'''Groola's Place''' was a large underground establishment on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] owned by [[Groola]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. It was located in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Tyrena/Legends|Tyrena]] near the city [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] and contained various levels including a bar, [[Restaurant/Legends|restaurant]], [[Casino/Legends|casino]], games and amusements, private halls, and Groola's Den.<ref name="CatCW" />

{{Loc-stub}}
